name: docx_open
description: Open a .docx file from a path or raw bytes and get a doc_id handle plus a human-readable summary of what the document contains. Call this first — every other tool requires the doc_id it returns. Opening never mutates the file.

path.description: Filesystem path to the .docx file. Provide path or bytes.

bytes.description: Base64-encoded .docx file content. Provide path or bytes.
